CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK( Guarantor_Home_Phone__c ), "", IF(LEN(Guarantor_Home_Phone__c ) = 10, "(" + LEFT( Guarantor_Home_Phone__c , 3) + ") " + MID(Guarantor_Home_Phone__c , 4, 3) + "-" + MID(Guarantor_Home_Phone__c , 7, 4), Guarantor_Home_Phone__c ) )
CustomField.label: Guarantor Home Phone Format
